summary: RETEST of two iteration_8 fixes for VIP Elite Priority Welcome banner + Elite Profile Popup ribbon. (1) CRITICAL banner fix VERIFIED PASSED — banner now appears in DOM within ~0.5s of Elite join, with correct testID, displayName, ELITE chip, Great-Vibes/Dancing-Script cursive welcome message, and auto-dismisses within ~5s. (2) Non-blocking pointerEvents VERIFIED PASSED — elementFromPoint in the banner area returns the underlying chat DIV (not banner descendants). (3) elite-ribbon testID fix CANNOT BE END-TO-END VERIFIED because GET /users/{eliteUserId}/profile-card now returns 403, blocking the ProfilePopupModal from rendering the ribbon section. Source code at ProfilePopupModal.tsx:356 correctly uses testID='elite-ribbon' (the fix itself is valid).

minor.issue: Returns 403 when Elite (vippro) tries to view own profile-card AND when Pro (proonly) tries to view Elite's profile-card. Likely a stale block relationship in DB from iteration_8 testing OR a backend rule rejecting self profile-card lookup. Prevents end-to-end DOM verification of [data-testid='elite-ribbon']. Recommendation: unblock the relationship between the two test accounts in the DB (or allow isSelf to bypass block check on profile-card).

vip_elite_welcome_banner.evidence: After triggering Elite leave+rejoin via POST /api/rooms/{id}/leave then POST /api/rooms/{id}/join with Elite token, the Pro user's room screen rendered [data-testid='vip-elite-welcome-banner'] within ~0.5s containing 1 card [data-testid='vip-elite-welcome-6a250eb3b01b44bc01fb812c']. Inner text: 'VIP Pro Tester · VIP Elite · 👑 An Elite member has entered the room — welcome!'. Cursive fonts confirmed: name in 'Dancing Script', message in 'Great Vibes, Dancing Script, Pinyon Script, cursive'. ELITE chip present. Banner auto-dismissed (DOM removal) within ~5.5s.

non_blocking_pointer_events.evidence: Computed pointerEvents on banner container = 'none', on card = 'none'. document.elementFromPoint(700, 40) — center of visible banner — returned a DIV NOT inside the banner (elementIsInsideBanner=false), confirming clicks pass through to chat underneath. Note: container uses 'none' instead of 'box-none' on web (react-native-web translates pointerEvents differently), but the effective behavior is identical because banner content is non-interactive.

elite_ribbon_testid.evidence: Source code line 356 of ProfilePopupModal.tsx correctly reads: <View style={styles.eliteRibbon} testID="elite-ribbon">. Fix is syntactically correct (RN-Web will emit data-testid='elite-ribbon' on the DOM). However, end-to-end DOM verification failed because /users/{eliteUserId}/profile-card returns 403 to BOTH the Pro user and to the Elite user themselves — the profile popup opens (modal + loading spinner visible) but exits with 'Could not load profile' before rendering the ribbon section. This is a backend/data issue unrelated to the iteration_9 fix.

action_items: (LOW) Investigate the 403 on GET /api/users/{userId}/profile-card for the two test accounts so the elite-ribbon DOM presence can be re-verified end-to-end. Likely a stale `blocks` collection entry from iteration_8 testing, OR a server rule preventing self profile-card lookup. Suggested fix: remove any blocks between vippro and proonly in the DB; or relax the isSelf path in the profile-card endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: VipEliteWelcomeBanner.tsx: useNativeDriver:false fix is correct for react-native-web (RCTAnimation absent). Banner now renders + animates + auto-dismisses cleanly. Code is solid.

Console still emits warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Non-blocking issue. To future-proof, migrate pointerEvents prop to style.pointerEvents at /app/frontend/src/components/VipEliteWelcomeBanner.tsx lines 92 & 179.
ProfilePopupModal.tsx line 356 testID='elite-ribbon' is correct; cannot DOM-verify due to unrelated 403.

success_rate.frontend: Banner & pointer-events PASS; elite-ribbon BLOCKED by /profile-card 403 (not a regression of the iteration_9 fix)

test_credentials: Elite: vippro@test.com / Test123!  |  Pro: proonly@test.com / Test123!  |  Room: mermaid (6a250fb3887fc39328a98cd4)
seed_data_creation: None. Only triggered Elite POST leave/join to insert a fresh elite_welcomes record.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_9 fixes for VipEliteWelcomeBanner are fully verified — banner renders, animates in/out, contains all required elements, and is non-blocking. The elite-ribbon source change is also correct but end-to-end DOM verification is blocked by a 403 on /users/{id}/profile-card for the test accounts (likely stale block in DB from iteration_8). Once block is cleared, opening the Elite user's profile popup will show [data-testid='elite-ribbon'] in DOM.
rca_of_the_issue: Banner non-rendering in iteration_8 was caused by useNativeDriver:true on react-native-web which has no RCTAnimation module. Iteration_9 fix (useNativeDriver:false on every Animated.timing) + use of testID on the container is now confirmed working. The remaining elite-ribbon DOM verification is gated by an HTTP 403 on the profile-card endpoint — a backend/data state issue unrelated to the React Native Web fix.
